sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 53:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 53:1
items.html: The level of the ten Sefirot that comes through a coupling by striking in the screen of phase one is called Yetzira. (Part 3, Chapter 3, item 3)
